# CWE-343 vulnerable — Predictable Value Range from Previous Values
lang: go
file: CWE-343-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

var spinState int = 7

func NextRaffleNumber(c *GinCtx) int {
	spinState = (spinState*3 + 1) % 97
	return spinState
}
